_comment: Copy this file to config/profile.json and fill in your details. See SETUP.md for instructions.
tech_stack: TypeScript, React, Next.js, Python, AI/ML, SQL

form_answers.professional_summary: Product leader with 8 years of experience scaling B2B SaaS products. Led cross-functional teams of 12+ across three product lines generating $40M ARR. Shipped AI-powered features that improved user retention by 35%.
form_answers.ai_experience: Built and shipped ML-powered recommendation engine serving 2M daily users. Led integration of LLM capabilities into enterprise workflow platform, reducing manual processing time by 60%. Experience with production ML pipelines, model evaluation, and A/B testing at scale.
form_answers.why_interested: This role aligns with my experience building AI-powered products at scale. I bring both strategic product vision and hands-on technical depth from leading product development across three successful B2B platforms. I'm eager to apply that experience to new challenges.
form_answers.additional_info: 8 years of product and engineering experience across B2B SaaS and AI/ML. Built recommendation systems serving millions, managed $40M ARR product portfolio, and led teams of 12+. Strong technical background with hands-on coding ability.
form_answers.compensation_text: Open to discussion based on total package

background_bullets: Acme Corp: Built ML recommendation engine serving 2M users, 35% retention improvement
PreviousCo: Managed $40M ARR product portfolio, led 12-person cross-functional team
Technical: TypeScript, React, Next.js, Python, ML/AI pipelines, production deployments
Style: data-driven product leader, zero-to-one builder, cross-functional alignment
role_matching: AI/ML Engineer → lead with ML recommendation engine, mention production pipelines
Product Manager → lead with $40M ARR portfolio, cross-functional leadership
VP/Director → lead with scale + team leadership + revenue impact
Staff Engineer → lead with technical depth, full-stack, production ML
cover_letter.banned_words: excited, passionate, thrilled, love, leverage, synergy, innovative, cutting-edge, world-class, dynamic, rockstar, guru, thought leader, disruptive, feel free, reach out, circle back, hit the ground running, move the needle, great fit, perfect fit, exclamation points, I believe, I feel, I think, proud to bring, aligns perfectly, aligns with, I am confident, I am writing to, I am applying, Dear Hiring Manager, To Whom It May Concern
